title: EKOS Enterprise Learning Roadmap
description: Complete learning journey for employees joining Jindal Stainless Limited through the EKOS Learning Platform.

stages.title: Company Orientation
stages.description: Learn about Jindal Stainless Limited, company history, products, values and manufacturing locations.

stages.title: Safety Training
stages.description: Industrial safety, PPE, emergency response and workplace safety.

stages.title: Manufacturing Learning
stages.description: Complete stainless steel manufacturing process from raw material to dispatch.

stages.title: Department Orientation
stages.description: Introduction to all plant departments and their responsibilities.

stages.title: SAP ERP Learning
stages.description: Learn SAP ERP modules used across JSL operations.

stages.title: Automation & Digital Manufacturing
stages.description: PLC, SCADA, AI, Industry 4.0 and Smart Manufacturing.

stages.title: Final Enterprise Assessment
stages.description: Final assessment covering all enterprise learning modules.
